news.headline: Fed Kugler: believes Fed should hold policy rate in place for some time
T-Mobile announces major support for first responders through T-Priority 5G, including a new agreement with NYC.
news.summary: T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) unveiled their latest initiative, T-Priority, a pioneering 5G solution aimed at enhancing connectivity for frontline workers, particularly first responders. At a recent event in New York City, Callie Field, President of T-Mobile Business Group, introduced four key enhancements aimed at bolstering support for first responders. This includes a significant partnership with the City of New York to become the exclusive carrier for all public services. This commitment underscores T-Mobile's dedication to providing top-notch services to first responders, emphasizing their commitment to ensuring seamless communication for those on the front lines.

news.headline: Winners of Digital Prosperity Awards revealed at 4th General Assembly of Digital Cooperation Organization in Amman, Jordan.
news.summary: Winners of the Digital Prosperity Awards were revealed during the 4th General Assembly of the Digital Cooperation Organization in Amman, Jordan.

news.headline: T-Mobile selected as sole carrier by NYC for mission-critical operations to enhance safety and affordability. Chief Technology Officer Matthew Fraser states collaboration aims to make city more secure and affordable.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, the City of New York has chosen T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) as its sole carrier to provide support for essential operations throughout the city. This decision comes as T-Mobile establishes itself as a leader in 5G technology in the United States. New York City's Chief Technology Officer, Matthew Fraser, expressed that the partnership with T-Mobile aligns with their goal of enhancing safety and affordability for all residents through advanced technology. This collaboration aims to leverage T-Mobile's innovative solutions for the benefit of the city's operations.

news.headline: IDEX Corp appoints Stephanie Disher and Matthijs Glastra to the board, increasing directors from 10 to 12; effective Feb 21, 2025.
news.summary: IDEX Corporation (NYSE: IEX) based in Northbrook, Illinois, has recently appointed Stephanie Disher and Matthijs Glastra to its Board of Directors. The new appointments, effective as of Friday, February 21, 2025, have expanded the Board from 10 to 12 directors. Ms. Disher will join the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee, while Mr. Glastra will be part of the Audit Committee. Ms. Disher currently holds the position of Chief Executive Officer of Atm.

news.headline: DCM introduces dividend program; declares special dividend to shareholders; emphasis on commitment to giving back.
news.summary: In Brampton, Ontario, DATA Communications Management Corp. (DCM) (TSX: DCM; OTCQX: DCMDF) disclosed that its Board of Directors has confirmed a special dividend for shareholders and has sanctioned the initiation of a regular quarterly dividend scheme. DCM, renowned for offering print and digital solutions to streamline intricate marketing communication processes, takes this step to emphasize its dedication to shareholder value. This move underscores the company’s strategy to reward its shareholders.

news.headline: TBC opens new blood distribution facility in Augusta, GA to enhance blood supplies statewide, set to open in May 2025.
news.summary: A leading community blood center, The Blood Connection (TBC), is boosting statewide blood supplies and services in Georgia with the introduction of a new blood distribution and operations facility in Augusta. This expansion is scheduled for completion in May 2025 and is poised to significantly enhance the organization's capacity to serve the community. The new facility aims to bolster blood supplies and services across the state, catering to the increasing demand for blood products. This initiative by TBC signifies a substantial investment in improving healthcare provision, with the facility expected to play a vital role in meeting the growing needs for blood donations.

news.headline: Harvest Commercial Capital, LLC closed its fourth securitization of first-lien SBA 504 loans and conventional real estate loans, totaling $264.6 million, rated by DBRS, Inc.
news.summary: A company in Laguna Hills, California, called Harvest Commercial Capital, LLC (HCC) has recently made headlines for securitizing a substantial amount of commercial real estate loans. Their latest transaction, referred to as HCCLT 2025-1, involved $264.6 million in first-lien, SBA 504, and conventional fixed-rate loans. The securitization was managed by Mizuho Securities USA, LLC, with Performance Trust Capital Partners also playing a role as Joint Bookrunner. DBRS, Inc. rated the transaction as “A”. Harvest Commercial Capital, LLC is known for being a leading non-bank lender nationwide when it comes to providing loans for owner-occupied small balance commercial real estate properties.

news.headline: K92 Mining reports drilling results from Arakompa with confirmation of 2 thick high-grade veins, southern strike extension, and bulk zone expansion.
news.summary: K92 Mining has recently disclosed the drilling outcomes from Arakompa, revealing the validation of two noteworthy high-grade veins. Additionally, the results indicate an extension towards the south and expansion of the bulk zone. This update signifies a crucial development in the mining sector, with the confirmation of rich mineral veins and potential for further exploration. The findings bolster prospects with significant high-grade mineral content in the area, pointing towards a positive trajectory for K92 Mining. This report underscores the importance of ongoing exploration efforts in unlocking the mineral potential of the region.

news.headline: Palmetto Subacute Care Center reports data breach on Feb. 20, 2025; incident occurred on Sept. 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Miami on February 20, 2025, it was reported that Palmetto Operating LLC, also known as Palmetto Subacute Care Center, became aware of a data security breach around September 19, 2024. The incident involved a third-party vendor and potentially exposed the personal data of both current and former patients.

news.headline: Centerra Gold will pay a dividend of C$0.07 per share on March 27, totaling C$14.7 million or US$10.2 million.
news.summary: Toronto-based Centerra Gold Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of C$0.07 per common share, totaling around C$14.7 million or US$10.2 million overall. The dividend, approved by the company's Board of Directors, will be disbursed on March 27, 2025, to shareholders recorded by the end of business on March 13, 2025. This dividend qualifies as an eligible dividend for Canadian income tax objectives.

news.headline: 1,800+ Black women in corporate America to gather in Las Vegas for 2025 Women of Power Summit with influential leaders.
news.summary: In an upcoming event in Las Vegas from March 5-9, 2025, over 1,800 influential Black women from corporate America will gather at the Women of Power Summit. This summit will bring together top business leaders, media pioneers, and political figures to discuss leadership and empowerment. The event aims to provide a platform for these powerful women to network, share insights, and inspire others in their respective fields.

news.headline: Eric Wallentine and Nate Benjamin named 2025 IFA Franchisee of the Year for their Homewatch CareGivers franchise in Southern Idaho.
news.summary: Two Southern Idaho business owners, Eric Wallentine and Nate Benjamin, were recognized for their achievements in business, community service, and leadership at the IFA Annual Convention held in Las Vegas. The owners of Homewatch CareGivers of Southern Idaho were honored at the event. The awards ceremony took place on February 20, 2025, in Greenwood Village, Colorado. The recognition highlighted their contributions to the industry and local community.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: The US economy remains on a firm footing.
Fed's Kugler: Downward risks to employment have diminished, upside risks to inflation remain, path to 2% inflation bumpy.
Fed's Kugler: The Fed's policy rate is moderately restrictive.
Fed's Kugler: January 12-month PCE inflation estimated at 2.4%, core PCE at 2.6%; there's still some way to go to reach the 2% target.

This method integrates data from clinical trials and real-world evidence to evaluate the comprehensive impact of groundbreaking medical technologies. This innovative framework marks a significant advancement in healthcare evaluation.

news.headline: Switch from butter to olive oil for heart health, says Dr. Nicole Avena during Heart Health Month.
news.summary: In Baltimore, during Heart Health Month, consider making a beneficial change by trading butter for olive oil. Dr. Nicole Avena suggests this easy swap for a healthier heart.

news.headline: Booking Holdings stock rises after posting Q4 earnings above expectations due to strong travel demand.(Character count: 99)
news.summary: Booking Holdings' stock experienced an increase following the company's release of its Q4 earnings report, which exceeded Wall Street expectations. The strong financial results were driven by robust travel demand. Shares rose as investors responded positively to the news. It was reported that the company's Q4 earnings and sales surpassed market projections.

news.headline: Cruise stocks plummet after US official claims industry avoids taxes, warns of crackdown.
news.summary: Following remarks from a U.S. official regarding the cruise industry's tax avoidance, several cruise stocks witnessed a decline below crucial support levels. This statement led to concerns of a potential crackdown by authorities. The post on Investor's Business Daily highlighted the reaction in the market, labeling it as a "massive overreaction." This news has affected the industry significantly, with cruise stocks experiencing a notable slide in response to the warnings of potential tax-related actions.

news.headline: MercadoLibre's Q4 earnings beat expectations, at $12.61 per share (est. $7.90), boosting MELI stock.
news.summary: MercadoLibre stock surged as their earnings of $12.61 per share surpassed the expected $7.90 per share, leading to a rise in their stock value. The strong sales growth in Q4 contributed to this positive outcome for the company.

news.headline: Germany’s political center shows strength amid elections with polling at 35%, potentially securing a majority.
Earnings reports flood in, driving market activity on Closing Bell.
Q4 earnings and revenue miss estimates for Block, Square stock falls as investors consider mixed key financial metrics.
news.summary: During the fourth quarter, Block announced earnings and revenue figures that fell short of expectations. This led to a decline in Square stock prices as investors considered the mixed results for important financial metrics. The specific numbers were not disclosed, but the underperformance in earnings and revenue had a negative impact on investor confidence in Square. This information was reported on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Stock market down, Reddit thrashed. Dow Jones leads downside. Walmart fell 6% due to weak profit outlook.
news.summary: Today, sellers dominated the stock market as Walmart experienced a 6% drop due to a profit outlook that fell short of expectations. The Dow Jones led the downside trend, with Reddit also facing losses. Growth stocks exhibited bearish signals amidst live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
